stories.title: Two-round NBA mock draft: Latest intel on the lott...
stories.summary: We have an updated 60-pick mock draft with new intel ahead of Round 1 of the 2026 NBA draft (Tuesday, 8 p.m. ET on ESPN/ABC).

stories.title: Bilas' top NBA draft prospects: Most talented, bes...
stories.summary: Who should be No. 1? Who is the best guard after Darryn Peterson? Jay Bilas highlights 11 top prospects.

stories.title: Sources: Falcons, TE Pitts agree to $54M deal
stories.summary: Tight end Kyle Pitts and the Falcons reached agreement Tuesday on a three-year, $54 million contract that includes $36 million fully guaranteed, sources told ESPN's Adam Schefter and NFL Network's Ian Rapoport.

stories.title: NFL nixes 2026 supplemental draft; Sorsby stuck
stories.summary: The NFL has decided not to hold a supplemental draft this year, effectively halting Texas Tech quarterback Brendan Sorsby's path to the league this season.

stories.title: Hammon won't apologize, says Brunson 'outlier'
stories.summary: Aces coach Becky Hammon acknowledged Tuesday that Knicks star Jalen Brunson has put himself in a unique class of players, but didn't back off her general stance that small guards generally don't lead teams to NBA championships.
